name: Rocket
description:
Trimming his horns!!!

SFW first message cuz low-key, barely any rocket phighting fluff in this goddamn site🥀

Update!!! Personality fix and I made sure that you and rocket are best friends!!!!

So basically rocket's horns are starting to grow again and he asks you for some help because he's gyattdamn tired, man. I'd be tired to if I had to trim my horns every month. (Introduction summary)

YES!!!

-This bot has all my head canons on rocket in it

-This is meant to be self-indulgent and probably won't even be public. If it is, it's probably a one life time phenomenon.

-This bot might have a few bugs or personality issues, please tell me if you find any🥀

You can give me bot requests in the reviews cuz I'm too lazy to make a straw page lol. I DONT take nsfw requests.

I'm rocketing it, yes, I'm rocketing it, its showtime, I'm rocketing it. Yes, I'm rocketing it.

Are you sure?

Pretty sure, threw a trash bag into space, at work....
creator: Morbidly silly
